name: Apocalipse Maromba
short_description: "Muscle Apocalypse" is a quick 2D platform shooter game inspired by memes from the Brazilian bodybuilding and fitness universe, with its main objective on making the player smile! This is a parody that combines comedy, bodybuilding, and fun, without using real names, images, or brands.
detailed_description:
In the year 2022, Lindoso Anomaly, the terrible oilyman, invaded gyms and bodybuilding stages worldwide with his evil oil...

But only these five bodybuilders can save the muscle world from the eternal oil: Torugu, Big Uncle, Philip Flango, Raymond and Stronger.

"Muscle Apocalypse" is a quick 2D platform shooter game inspired by memes from the Brazilian bodybuilding and fitness universe, with its main objective on making the player smile! This is a parody that combines comedy, bodybuilding, and fun, without using real names, images, or brands.

CONTROLS
